name: AscoBreastCancerGuidelineProtocolTnbcPlanningStep
title: Plan TNBC therapy
description: Choose anthracycline taxane chemotherapy, decide on carboplatin, and avoid routine immune checkpoint inhibitor use or low-stage overtreatment.
